messages.title: ✋ New game: Hand Cricket League!
messages.body: Pick numbers 1–10, unleash Crazy mode, and challenge a friend in a real-time online room. Leagues, cups & a learning AI await!

messages.title: 🍔 New game: Basket Catch 2!
messages.body: Catch the fruit, dodge the junk food, and feast on Cheat Day! Try the sequel to Basket Catch.

messages.title: 🏆 Leaderboards are live!
messages.body: Log in, beat the high scores, and climb to the top across every game!
